description: Civics and Citizenship capability progression map — Skills strand, Year 7 to 10. Four sub-strands following ACARA headings.
subject: Civics and Citizenship

standards.title: Develop civic inquiry questions
standards.description: develop questions to investigate Australia's political and legal systems, and contemporary civic issues
standards.capability_goal: Students develop questions to investigate Australia's political and legal systems and contemporary civic issues.

standards.title: Locate and organise information
standards.description: locate, select and organise information, data and ideas from different sources
standards.capability_goal: Students locate, select and organise information, data and ideas from different sources.

standards.title: Analyse civic perspectives
standards.description: analyse information, data and ideas about political, legal or civic issues to identify and explain differences in perspectives and potential challenges
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse information about political, legal or civic issues to identify and explain differences in perspectives and challenges.

standards.title: Explain civic participation methods
standards.description: explain the methods or strategies related to making decisions about civic participation
standards.capability_goal: Students explain the methods or strategies related to making decisions about civic participation.

standards.title: Create civic arguments
standards.description: create descriptions, explanations and arguments using civics and citizenship knowledge, concepts and terms that reference evidence
standards.capability_goal: Students create descriptions, explanations and arguments using civics and citizenship knowledge that reference evidence.
